# viettelidc_ovpc_subnet (Resource)

ViettelIDC subnet inside a VPC.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable subnet name.
- `network_address` (String) CIDR network address (e.g. 10.0.0.0/24). Immutable.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description.
- `is_public_zone` (Boolean) Whether the subnet sits in the public zone. Immutable.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID. Falls back to the provider default vpc_id when unset.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Subnet ID assigned by the system (vttSubnetId).
